SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

org.dbxml.xml
Interface Symbols

public interface Symbols

Symbols is an interface that allows the dbXML Compression system to resolve symbol IDs in compression/decompression passes.
